allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add bartender drink library management page

Bartender can now toggle drinks on/off from a pre-populated library
of ~70 drinks across 5 categories \(Cocktails, Wine, Beer, Spirits,
Non-Alcoholic\). Includes per-drink toggles, category-level enable/disable
all, search, and collapsible sections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Replace CSS logo with custom hand-drawn logo image

Use the new logo PNG with animated glow dots overlaid at
pixel-accurate positions to create the marquee light effect.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Remove animated marquee dots, keep static logo only

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(Vermouth: Spray"\)
- Disable Add to Cart until all dropdowns are selected

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
